synopsis: "Bedtime on Concordia" is a short story published in the developer blog for Star Wars: The Old Republic on October 28, 2014. It foreshadows the first appearance of Shae Vizla in the Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan expansion, who despite being featured prominently in the promotional material for the original game, was completely absent from the game at the time of 2011 release. Shae appears in a story within the story, which the Mandalorian warrior Galron tells to his daughters around a campfire.
title: Bedtime On Concordia
